# zstack_alarm (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage alarms in ZStack. An alarm monitors metrics and triggers when thresholds are exceeded.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `comparison_operator` (String) The comparison operator (e.g., GreaterThanOrEqualTo, LessThan).
- `metric_name` (String) The name of the metric to monitor.
- `name` (String) The name of the alarm.
- `namespace` (String) The namespace of the metric.
- `threshold` (Number) The threshold value that triggers the alarm.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the alarm.
- `period` (Number) The period in seconds over which the metric is evaluated.
- `repeat_interval` (Number) The interval in seconds between repeated alarm notifications.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The current state of the alarm.
- `status` (String) The current status of the alarm.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the alarm.
